title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Revert the Allowable Maintenance and Other Operating Expense (MOOE) Allotments for Fy 2022 to Other Benefits for the Payment of Collective Negotiation Agreement (CNA) Incentive. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 12/05/2022)
